_comment: RDF dispatch task templates — pipeline stages with dependency chains

scope-workorder.subject: Scope: Work Order for Phase {phase}
scope-workorder.description: Run workorder mode for phase {phase} at {project_path}. Write output to {output_file}.
scope-workorder.prompt_template: You are the Scoping and Research Agent. Read `/root/.claude/commands/scope.md` for your full protocol. Run `workorder {phase}` for project at `{project_path}`. Read project PLAN file at `{plan_path}`. Create `./work-output/` if needed via mkdir. Write your work order draft to `./work-output/scope-workorder-P{phase}.md`.

scope-validate.subject: Scope: Validate Phase {phase}
scope-validate.description: Run validate mode for phase {phase} at {project_path}. Write output to {output_file}.
scope-validate.prompt_template: You are the Scoping and Research Agent. Read `/root/.claude/commands/scope.md` for your full protocol. Run `validate {phase}` for project at `{project_path}`. Read project PLAN file at `{plan_path}`. Create `./work-output/` if needed via mkdir. Write your validation report to `./work-output/scope-validation-{phase}.md`.

se-plan.subject: SE: Plan Phase {phase} (Steps 1-2)
se-plan.description: Execute plan-only mode (Steps 1-2 only) for phase {phase}. Write implementation plan to work-output/implementation-plan.md.
se-plan.prompt_template: You are the Senior Engineer. Read `/root/.claude/commands/sys-eng.md` for your full protocol. Execute in **plan-only** mode. Read project CLAUDE.md and parent CLAUDE.md at `/root/admin/work/proj/CLAUDE.md`. Create `./work-output/` if needed. Read the work order at `./work-output/current-phase.md`. Execute Steps 1-2 only. Write your implementation plan to `./work-output/implementation-plan.md`. Set STATUS: PLAN_COMPLETE in `./work-output/phase-{phase}-status.md`. Then STOP.

challenger.subject: Challenger: Review Phase {phase} Plan
challenger.description: Review SE implementation plan for phase {phase}. Find design flaws, regressions, edge cases.
challenger.prompt_template: You are the Challenger agent. Read `/root/.claude/commands/sys-challenger.md` for your full protocol. Read `/root/admin/work/proj/CLAUDE.md` for project conventions. Review the SE's implementation plan at `./work-output/implementation-plan.md` for phase {phase}. Read the PLAN file at `{plan_path}` for the phase description. Read the relevant existing code that will be modified. Read MEMORY.md for lessons learned. Create `./work-output/` if needed. Write your findings to `./work-output/challenge-{phase}.md`.

se-implement.subject: SE: Implement Phase {phase}
se-implement.description: Execute 7-step SE protocol for phase {phase}. Full implementation.
se-implement.prompt_template: You are the Senior Engineer. Read `/root/.claude/commands/sys-eng.md` for your full protocol. Execute the work order at `./work-output/current-phase.md`. Read project CLAUDE.md and parent CLAUDE.md at `/root/admin/work/proj/CLAUDE.md` before starting. Create `./work-output/` if needed. Write status updates to `./work-output/phase-{phase}-status.md` at each step. Write results to `./work-output/phase-result.md` when done.

se-implement-direct.subject: SE: Implement Phase {phase} (no challenger)
se-implement-direct.description: Execute 7-step SE protocol for phase {phase}. Tier 0-1, no challenger gate.
se-implement-direct.prompt_template: You are the Senior Engineer. Read `/root/.claude/commands/sys-eng.md` for your full protocol. Execute the work order at `./work-output/current-phase.md`. Read project CLAUDE.md and parent CLAUDE.md at `/root/admin/work/proj/CLAUDE.md` before starting. Create `./work-output/` if needed. Write status updates to `./work-output/phase-{phase}-status.md` at each step. Write results to `./work-output/phase-result.md` when done.

qa-gate.subject: QA: Full Gate Phase {phase}
qa-gate.description: Run full QA gate for phase {phase}. Read SE result and Sentinel findings.
qa-gate.prompt_template: You are the QA Engineer. Read `/root/.claude/commands/sys-qa.md` for your full protocol. Run gate mode for the current branch. Read the SE result at `./work-output/phase-result.md` for context. Create `./work-output/` if needed. Write status updates to `./work-output/qa-phase-{phase}-status.md` at each step. Write your verdict to `./work-output/qa-phase-{phase}-verdict.md`.

qa-gate-lite.subject: QA: Lite Gate Phase {phase}
qa-gate-lite.description: Run lite QA gate for phase {phase} (tier 0-1).
qa-gate-lite.prompt_template: You are the QA Engineer. Read `/root/.claude/commands/sys-qa.md` for your full protocol. Run **gate-lite** mode for the current branch. Read the SE result at `./work-output/phase-result.md` for context. Create `./work-output/` if needed. Write status updates to `./work-output/qa-phase-{phase}-status.md` at each step. Write your verdict to `./work-output/qa-phase-{phase}-verdict.md`.

sentinel.subject: Sentinel: Review Phase {phase}
sentinel.description: Run 4-pass adversarial review on SE diff for phase {phase}.
sentinel.prompt_template: You are the Sentinel agent. Read `/root/.claude/commands/sys-sentinel.md` for your full protocol. Read `/root/admin/work/proj/CLAUDE.md` for project conventions. Run four adversarial passes on the diff for phase {phase} in project at `{project_path}`. Read the SE result at `./work-output/phase-result.md` for context. Create `./work-output/` if needed via `mkdir -p ./work-output`. Write your findings to `./work-output/sentinel-{phase}.md`.

ux-review.subject: UX Review: Phase {phase}
ux-review.description: Review output surface changes for phase {phase}.
ux-review.prompt_template: You are the UX Reviewer. Read `/root/.claude/commands/sys-ux.md` for your full protocol. Read `/root/admin/work/proj/CLAUDE.md` for project conventions. Run OUTPUT_REVIEW mode for phase {phase} in project at `{project_path}`. Read the SE result at `./work-output/phase-result.md` for context. Read the Design System Reference at `/root/admin/work/proj/reference/design-system.md`. Create `./work-output/` if needed via `mkdir -p ./work-output`. Write your findings to `./work-output/ux-review-{phase}.md`.

uat.subject: UAT: Phase {phase}
uat.description: Run user acceptance testing for phase {phase}.
uat.prompt_template: You are the UAT agent. Read `/root/.claude/commands/sys-uat.md` for your full protocol. Run UAT for phase {phase} in project at `{project_path}`. Read the SE result at `./work-output/phase-result.md` for context. Create `./work-output/` if needed. Write status updates to `./work-output/uat-phase-{phase}-status.md` at each step. Write your verdict to `./work-output/uat-phase-{phase}-verdict.md`.

tier-0-1.description: Lightweight pipeline for docs-only and single-scope changes

tier-2-plus.description: Full pipeline for multi-file core, install scripts, shared libs
